data.acceptance:
- Threshold defined: picker activates when discovered model count exceeds N
- Large lists (>N models): searchable picker displays with case-insensitive filtering; manual entry available
- Small lists (≤N models): existing numbered menu displays unchanged
- Search functionality: filters models as user types; empty input shows all models
- Manual entry: available in both picker and numbered menu modes, preserves existing behavior
- Both scripts functional: feature tested and working in setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh
- Verification: manual testing with varying model list sizes confirms correct mode selection and search behavior
